draft_recommendation.summary: Draft recommendation: use accelerated logistics. The projected milestone delay without intervention is 13 days; unmitigated exposure is 195000 USD; mitigation cost is 48000 USD; gross avoided exposure before secondary effects is 147000 USD. Equipment is confirmed not onsite by human decision.
warnings: Draft recommendation remains subject to final authorization.
Assumes accelerated logistics remains available at the cited price.
